decb064a-77c8-4370-a14b-f0d079c8809d.name: + calculerCoutTotal()
decb064a-77c8-4370-a14b-f0d079c8809d.code:
async def calculerCoutTotal(self):
    salle = await get_salle(self.salle)
    duree = (self.dateFin - self.dateDebut).days
    cout = salle.prixBase * duree
    return cout

f584934f-c5de-4387-a15c-376fba813ebe.name: + creerReservation(evenement, salle, dateDebut, dateFin)
f584934f-c5de-4387-a15c-376fba813ebe.code:
async def creerReservation(self, evenement, salle, dateDebut, dateFin):
    dispo = await execute_salle_method(
        salle.id,
        "estDisponible",
        {"dateDebut": dateDebut, "dateFin": dateFin}
    )
    if not dispo:
        raise Exception("Salle non disponible")

    reservation = await create_reservation(
        ReservationCreate(
            evenement=evenement,
            salle=salle,
            dateDebut=dateDebut,
            dateFin=dateFin,
            estConfirmer=False
        )
    )
    return reservation
